title: Working in Politics and Public Policy
shortSummary: See what people in the field actually do: what they read, what they write, who they deal with, what pressure they face, and how careers improve over time.
whyItMatters: A field only becomes real when you know what its jobs actually look like. This module grounds politics in working lives rather than abstract interest.
mentalModels: Judgment under ambiguity is a career multiplier
Network quality matters, but integrity limits matter too

goDeeper.label: Open the day-in-the-life section
goDeeper.description: Browse grounded working weeks across politics, policy, scrutiny, influence, and media.
